title: Has anyone seen this figure
wikitext:
[]: Has anyone seen this figure?             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Mon Sep 04, 2006 2:45 pm This one, on the right: Note the different joints, and the "dimmer" EVA 1 on the shoulder, possibly suggesting it.....lights up? I dunno. (Fixed)

[]: Re: Has anyone seen this figure?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Sep 04, 2006 3:13 pm Rahaquiel-2D1S wrote: This one, on the right: Note the different joints, and the "dimmer" EVA 1 on the shoulder, possibly suggesting it.....lights up? I dunno. (Fixed)

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Mon Sep 04, 2006 3:16 pm It kept making it smaller, but now it's big again.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Sep 04, 2006 4:29 pm The one on the right is the Bandai model kit. My brother has it.

[]:             Quote Post by Rahaquiel-2D1S » Mon Sep 04, 2006 4:34 pm Don't tell me....you have to build, glue, and paint it?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Mon Sep 04, 2006 4:44 pm The one in that picture does not appear to be painted, and my brother did not paint his. You do have to assemble and glue it (and add stickers if you opt not to paint) but it's not really that hard. Painting is what's hard, if you opt to do it. I have the Unit 02 model, and I did a thourough paint job on it. It came out really nice.

[]:             Quote Post by tinmeigut » Tue Sep 05, 2006 7:13 am Eva Monkey is right. The large one is the Bandai Master Grade model which requires you to add painting yourself. I think it's quite hard to find that now.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Tue Sep 05, 2006 11:20 am Master grade? Huh, it doesn't really look different from the plain ol' one that my brother got.
